title: Portable foldable charcoal BBQ grill made from durable stainless steel. Ideal for garden parties, camping, picnics and outdoor cooking. Easy to set up with vents for even heat and smoky flavour.
features: Deliciously Smoky, Every Time: Enjoy the rich, unmistakable flavour that only charcoal grilling delivers. The Shelby Wood Company Grill lets you cook everything from sizzling steaks to tender kebabs with that authentic, flame-grilled taste outdoor chefs love.

Smart, Travel-Friendly Design: This BBQ is built for convenience on the go. It features a compact folding frame, integrated handles for easy carrying, and anti-slip rubber feet for stability—ideal for picnics, camping, beach days, or garden gatherings.

Effortless to Set Up & Grill: Be ready to cook in seconds. Just unfold the legs and add charcoal—no tools or complicated parts. Adjustable airflow vents at each end help regulate temperature and spread heat evenly across the grill surface.

Ready for Any Adventure: Whether you’re cooking in the garden, pitching up at a campsite, or grilling on the go, this foldable barbecue fits neatly in your car and sets up anywhere, taking up minimal space but delivering maximum flavour.

Reliable Stainless Steel Build: Constructed from durable 430-grade stainless steel, this grill resists rust, handles high heat with ease, and stands up to frequent use. It’s built to last and designed to deliver great results, cook after cook.
description: Product Description Portable Charcoal Grill 1, Foldable & Portable 2, Rust-resistant Stainless Steel 3, Anti-slip Camping Grill Feet 4, Suitable for Indoor/Outdoor 5, Size: 30.31 x 13.9 x 7.36 inches 200 Natural Firelighters For Fires, Barbeques, Clay Fire Pizza Ovens And Much More Made In The Heart Of The Black Country Paraffin Free 100% Natural – Odourless – Long Burning Sizes And Colours May Vary Due To Being A Natural Product. Rotate the Legs of BBQ Grill Put the Charcoal Mesh Put Into the Charcoal Install BBQ Wire Mesh Anti-Slip Foot Design The charcoal grill uses the rubber anti-slip foot, which can make the bbq camping grill steady to stand up, you can enjoy your delicious food wherever. Air Ventilation Vents Design Designed with air ventilation vents on both ends of the grill so that airflow can be controlled easily and heat distributed evenly throughout the grill. Stainless Steel BBQ Grill Made of rust-resistant stainless steel, brings you a healthy life. Heat-resistant and not easy to be deformed
